Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Motion for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiffs Wongful Death Heir and as Successor in Interest to Jesse Jenkins, deceased.
Plaintiff Judith Jenkins present in pro per.
Witness Jean Williams appeared by Court Call.
No appearance by Plaintiff Eva Jenkins.
Parties were sworn and testified.

After hearing the testimony and considered the evidence both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, the Court ordered for distribution of all net settlements funds derived from the personal injury - survival and wrongful death cause of action as following proportions:
Evan Jenkins 50%
Judith Jenkins 50%.
Attorneys' Fee and Costs $1,106.80
Order was submitted to and signed by the Court. (See scanned doc. for the details of Order)
